signals.headline: Iran Re-Closes Strait of Hormuz in Response to Ongoing US Blockade** | YES | HIGH[1][4][5][6][8]
signals.raw:
Iran Re-Closes Strait of Hormuz in Response to Ongoing US Blockade** | YES | HIGH[1][4][5][6][8]

Iran announced early Saturday (April 18, 2026) that it has reversed Friday's reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels, reinstating a blockade due to President Trump's insistence on maintaining the US naval blockade of Iranian ports and ships until a nuclear deal is reached[1][5][6][8].
matched_markets: US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?

signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]
